title: First Day of School
description: Classes begin for the 2026–2027 school year. Welcome assembly at 9:00 AM.

title: Implantação da República
description: No classes. Holiday commemorating the establishment of the Portuguese Republic in 1910.

title: Parent–Teacher Conferences
description: Individual meetings with teachers to discuss student progress. Sign-up sheets available at the office.

title: Dia de Todos os Santos
description: No classes. All Saints' Day holiday.

title: Tuition Due
description: First installment or full payment due. See School Fees for payment options.

title: Winter Break Begins
description: Last day of classes before winter break. Holiday celebration in classrooms.

title: Classes Resume
description: First day back after winter break.

title: Second Tuition Installment Due
description: Second installment due for families on the two-payment plan.

title: Spring Break Begins
description: No classes during spring break week.

title: Classes Resume
description: First day back after spring break.

title: Dia da Liberdade
description: No classes. Liberty Day holiday celebrating the 1974 Carnation Revolution.

title: Last Day of School
description: Final day of the 2026–2027 school year. End-of-year celebration and awards ceremony.
